# GitHub repository settings (copy-paste)

Use these values in **GitHub → Repository → Settings → General → About** and **Topics**.

## Description (short)

```
Sovereign real-time translation & live captions — Tether QVAC local AI + Keet P2P meetings. Audio stays on-device.
```

## Website

```
https://qvac.tether.io/
```

(Optional secondary link: https://keet.io/)

## Topics (add all)

```
qvac
tether
keet
holepunch
whisper
speech-to-text
translation
live-captions
sovereign-ai
local-ai
nextjs
fastapi
p2p
accessibility
```

## Social preview

Ensure the default social image shows the README title **GlobalBridge AI** after the next push (GitHub auto-generates from README unless you upload a custom image under Settings → General → Social preview).

## Branch protection

Settings → Branches → `main`:

- Require pull request before merging
- Require 1 approval
- Do not allow bypassing (admins included)
- Block force push

## Grant reviewers

Point reviewers to:

- [README.md](../README.md) — overview & quick start
- [docs/GRANT.md](../GRANT.md) — structured grant summary (QVAC + Keet)
